title: Senior Financial Analyst - MCX - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - MCX - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at MCX are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
